title: Subnautica Background Music
description: This resource pack replaces the vanilla background music with music from both Subnautica and Subnautica Below Zero.
body:
This resource pack replaces the vanilla music with music from both Subnautica and Subnautica Below Zero.

 

The resource pack will still work in older versions

### NOTE: The music in the pack does not belong to me and all rights go to the original creators; Simon Chylinski and Ben Prunty. ###
